name: great-operators
description: Nine operations personas (Cook, Grove, Munger, McCord, Deming, Ohno, Horowitz, Walton, Kelleher) + four MVP skills for operating plans, process reviews, and project initialization. Drafted via cross-plugin orchestration with great-authors writers. v0.1 MVP.

plugins.name: great-operators
plugins.description: Nine operations personas + four operational skills (operators-channel, operators-project-init, operators-write-plan, operators-ops-review). Companion to great-minds, great-authors, great-filmmakers, great-publishers, great-marketers, great-engineers, great-designers. For Claude Code.

plugins.name: great-operators-dxt
plugins.description: Same personas and skills as great-operators, packaged as a Claude Desktop extension. Build: cd distribution/dxt && npm install && npx @anthropic-ai/dxt pack
